falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above $0.75 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Contradicts the bottom pattern's bearish trajectory, indicating strength rather than collapse

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of 30-day average daily volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Destroys blowoff pattern validity by showing extreme liquidity rather than panic selling

falsification_conditions.condition: Major stablecoin project announces $1B liquidity injection
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Directly counters the 2022 Luna collapse dynamics by introducing systemic support

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
